recommended_fertiliser: NPK 15-15-15 at 200kg/ha + Urea top-dress at V6
notes: Low OM typical of Sudan savanna. Add organic matter.
Highland volcanic soils. Watch pH — lime may be needed if below 5.5.
Poor drainage — consider ridging. Teff tolerates poor soils better than most cereals.
Low P is limiting yield. Incorporate crop residues to build OM.

recommended_fertiliser: No inorganic fertiliser — use pod husk compost
notes: Cocoa soils in forest zone. Focus on organic matter; synthetic N can increase disease risk.
Adequate K. Main limitation is N. Inoculate seed with Rhizobium — free N fixation.
Sahel sandy soils lose nutrients fast. Split fertiliser application recommended.
Excellent volcanic soils. High yield potential if disease managed.
